title: リトルプリンセスたちの夢

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot two Umamusume with a bunch of
sweets laid out on a table.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, would you care to join us, Trainer? We're
holding a princess candy party. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Since we were both little, Fine and I have
dreamed of filling our bellies with tasty sweets!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was never allowed to have such treats at home,
so what better time is there to fulfill the dream
than now? ☆ These Japanese candies look so
delicious. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's ever so nostalgic. ♪ I remember how I would
dash to the candy shop every day as a child.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
How admirable! Even from a young age, you had
the agency to leave your castle alone to go
shopping?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, oh yes! ♪ The shopping district was like
my backyard garden! I strode around gallantly
with lots of ten-yen coins in hand!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So you learned the particulars of managing
money by mingling with the city folk? How
marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami, you are truly an Umamusume of firm
and responsible character. You have completely
won my admiration! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're going to make me blush! Both my
spirits and appetite are through the roof!
choice_data_list: Try not to get too carried away with the appetite...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gah, you're right. I shouldn't overeat!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe! My maid often told me the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, my mother was no joke either! If she caught
me overindulging, she'd strike like a bolt of
lightning!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two engage in a lively princess
discussion while enjoying their candy in
moderation.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course! A princess should eat a lot and laugh a
lot!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! I wholeheartedly agree. ♪ I must hurry
and try every tasty treat that this country has to
offer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Let's guzzle this all down until our stomachs are
about to burst!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two enjoy a rousing candy party,
eating until their stomachs are filled to the brim.
